case_title: JEAN REZABECK VS. SAFEWAY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGESS REPORT OF 7/21/14. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN G. TREMPER--INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
